notes: Web-services-based IT infrastructure centered on business processes and services; displaced by microservices/REST APIs/cloud-native architectures
Middleware integration layer for SOA; TIBCO, webMethods, IBM, Oracle, BEA; displaced by API gateways/event streaming
XML-based RPC/messaging protocol; WS-* stack; displaced by REST/JSON and later GraphQL/gRPC
Aberdeen-coined SOA adoption tier: Apache Axis + open-source ESBs + web-services standards for small companies and self-service integration
Aberdeen-coined SOA adoption tier: full ESB + BPM + registry/repository commercial suite (IBM, Oracle/BEA, TIBCO, webMethods/Software AG) for complex mission-critical installations
Aberdeen-coined SOA adoption tier: SAP NetWeaver, Oracle Fusion, Microsoft BizTalk; entry-level SOA for mid-size and some large companies via ERP platform extensions
